REDIS_URL=redis://default:redis_pass123@redis.example.com:6379
MONGODB_URI=mongodb://admin:mongoPass@mongo.example.com:27017/mydb

SAFE_URL=https://example.com/api/v1
NO_CREDS_URL=redis://redis.example.com:6379
